post.description: This operation lists the information about all existing roles.

zh-CN.description: 本接口可列出所有已创建角色的相关信息。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为<include target="zilliz">具备适当权限的 API 密钥或</include>用冒号分隔的用户名和密码，如 `username:password`。

dbName.description: Name of the database. If not specified, the default database is used.

200.description: A RoleInfo object that contains a list of RoleItem objects.

zh-CN.description: 包含 RoleItem 对象列表的 RoleInfo 对象

data.description: Response payload which is a list of item objects.

zh-CN.description: 响应载荷，为元素对象列表。

post.description: This operation describes the details of a specified role.

zh-CN.description: 本接口可列出指定角色的详细信息。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为<include target="zilliz">具备适当权限的 API 密钥或</include>用冒号分隔的用户名和密码，如 `username:password`。

dbName.description: Name of the database. If not specified, the default database is used.

200.description: An object that contains the detailed desription of a role.

zh-CN.description: 返回一个包含指定角色的详细信息对象。

object_type.description: The type of the object to which the privilege belongs.

privilege.description: The privilege that is granted to the role.

zh-CN.description: 授予当前角色的权限名称。

object_name.description: The name of the object to which the role is granted the specified privilege.

zh-CN.description: 授予当前角色的权限所属的对象名称。

db_name.description: The name of the database in which this operation has been executed.

zh-CN.description: 当前操作所在数据库名称。

grantor.description: The name of the user who granted a specific role to a user.

zh-CN.description: 被授予当前权限的用户名称。

data.description: Response payload which is a list of privilege items.

zh-CN.description: 响应载荷，为权限对象列表。

value.description: Grants read-only access to analytics collections.
Grants read-only access to analytics collections.

dbName.description: Name of the database. If not specified, the default database is used.

200.description: Returns an empty object or an error message.

data.description: Response payload which is an empty object.

post.description: This operation grants a privilege to the current role.

zh-CN.description: 本接口将相关权限授予当前角色。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`.

objectType.description: The type of the object to which the privilege belongs.

zh-CN.description: 待授予权限所属的对象类型。

objectName.description: The name of the object to which the role is granted the specified privilege.

post.description: This operation revokes a privilege granted to the current role.

zh-CN.description: 本操作可撤销当前角色所授予的权限。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌。应为<include target="zilliz">具备适当权限的 API 密钥或</include>用冒号分隔的用户名和密码，如 `username:password`。

objectType.description: The type of the object to which the specified privilege belongs.

zh-CN.description: 指定权限所属的对象类型。

objectName.description: The name of the object to which the specified privilege belongs.

zh-CN.description: 指定权限所属的对象名称。

privilege.description: The privilege that is revoked from the role.

zh-CN.description: 当前角色需撤销的权限名称。

dbName.description: Name of the database. If not specified, the default database is used.

200.description: Return an empty object or an error message.

data.description: Response payload which is an empty object.

post.description: This operation drops an existing role. The operation will succeed if the specified role exists. Otherwise, this operation will fail.

zh-CN.description: 本接口可以删除指定角色。如果指定的角色存在，操作将成功。否则，操作将失败。

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`.

200.description: Return an empty object or an error message.

data.description: Response payload which is an empty object.

post.description: This operation grants a privilege to a role at the global, database, or collection level.

zh-CN.description: 本接口在全局、数据库或 Collection 级别将权限授予指定角色。

privilege.description: The privilege to grant or revoke.

dbName.description: The name of the database to which the privilege applies. Use `*` for all databases.

zh-CN.description: 权限适用的数据库名称。使用 `*` 表示所有数据库。

collectionName.description: The name of the collection to which the privilege applies. Use `*` for all collections.

zh-CN.description: 权限适用的 Collection 名称。使用 `*` 表示所有 Collection。

post.description: This operation revokes a privilege from a role at the global, database, or collection level.

zh-CN.description: 本接口在全局、数据库或 Collection 级别撤销指定角色的权限。

privilege.description: The privilege to grant or revoke.

dbName.description: The name of the database to which the privilege applies. Use `*` for all databases.

collectionName.description: The name of the collection to which the privilege applies. Use `*` for all collections.

zh-CN.description: 权限适用的 Collection 名称。使用 `*` 表示所有 Collection。

AuthorizationHeader.name: Authorization
AuthorizationHeader.description: The authentication token should be <include target="zilliz">an API key with appropriate privileges or </include>a pair of colon-joined username and password, like `username:password`. If you are using a project endpoint, only a valid API key with sufficient permissions applies.

zh-CN.description: 认证令牌，应为<include target="zilliz">具备适当权限的 API 密钥或</include>用冒号分隔的用户名和密码，如 `username:password`。如果您使用的是项目端点，则仅具备足够权限的有效 API 密钥适用。
